matched.name: Sway
matched.description: Sway is a mesh chair designed for posture support and comfort.

features: Shaping your daily rhythm, Where motion meets intention.
specs.dimensions: Armrest length: 250 mm.; Seat height till ground: 430 mm.; Total length: 1010 mm.; Seat base width (including wheels): 660 mm.; Seat backrest width: 465 mm.; Overall height: 1180 mm.; Armrest height till seat: 300 mm.; Armrest width: 95 mm.; Headrest width: 320 mm.; Headrest length: 170 mm.

overview_sections.heading: Shaping your daily rhythm, Where motion meets intention.
overview_sections.body: Sway is crafted for those who thrive on fluidity and focus. Its agile design empowers seamless transitions between tasks, offering dependable ease and elegant responsiveness. More than just a chair—it’s a rhythm partner for your workday.
A supple frame and tailored adjustments keep your form aligned, easing physical effort and allowing mental clarity to take the lead
Sway’s multidirectional arm platforms adapt to your preferred angle and elevation, minimizing pressure on upper limbs and enhancing ease
Engineered with a contouring back zone that adjusts to your curvature, Sway encourages an upright stance and mitigates tension near the spine

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: X-Mesh
matched.description: X-Mesh is a mesh chair designed for breathability and comfort.

overview_sections.heading: Intelligent Spine Support
overview_sections.body: The X Mess chair is crafted for ultimate comfort with a high quality PU moulded cushion and support that enhances posture and reduces strain.

Designed for extended work hours, the chair features a breathable mesh back and adjustable armrests for personalized comfort. With its sleek design and durable construction, X Mess is a perfect fit for modern, high performance workspaces.

matched.name: Zilo
matched.description: Zilo is a cafe chair designed for flexible and stylish workspaces.

overview_sections.heading: Classic Essential
overview_sections.body: The Zilo Café Chair reflects modern simplicity with its clean, confident form. Its ergonomically shaped seat offers comfortable support, making it suitable for long hours of use. Designed with contemporary appeal, it blends seamlessly into café, dining, and social environments.

Lightweight and highly versatile, the Flare Café Chair performs effortlessly in both indoor and outdoor spaces. Its durable construction ensures reliable everyday use while maintaining a sleek, minimal aesthetic. Practical yet stylish, it fits perfectly into a variety of modern settings.
The gently curved backrest supports the spine for comfortable, upright seating, while its wide surface ensures balanced comfort for longer use.

The polished metal legs offer strong stability with a clean, modern look. Their slim tubular form keeps the chair lightweight and easy to move without sacrificing durability, making them ideal for long-lasting performance in both home and commercial spaces.

specs.warranty_text: Backed by our comprehensive upto 10 year warranty, ensuring lasting quality and peace of mind with every purchase.
specs.sustainability_text: Crafted with eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices to minimize environmental impact while maximizing durability.

matched.name: Accent
matched.description: Accent is a lounge designed for modern design and functional workspaces.

specs.dimensions: Overall Width (Front View): 870 mm Overall Depth (Side View): 860 mm Overall Height: 820 mm Seat Height: 410 mm‍

overview_sections.heading: Effortless Modernity
overview_sections.body: The Accent blends contemporary elegance with exceptional comfort, featuring a sleek, sculpted silhouette and plush brown upholstery. Its refined form adds sophistication to any office, lounge, or collaborative space. Designed to create a welcoming atmosphere, it pairs style with effortless ease.

Supported by sturdy black metal legs, the chair offers reliable stability while maintaining a modern, lightweight look. Its durable structure ensures long-lasting performance in high-use environments. Perfect for relaxation or casual meetings, it delivers a balance of comfort, functionality, and visual appeal.
The wide, softly curved backrest and arm integration create a cocoon-like form that supports the body naturally, offering exceptional comfort for long sitting sessions.
The double-layered seat with plush, high-density cushioning provides superior softness and resilience, ensuring lasting comfort and an elevated luxe feel.

matched.name: Adam
matched.description: Adam is a lounge designed for modern workspaces.

specs.dimensions: Overall Height: 900 mm Seat Height: 450 mm; Overall Width (Top View): 550 mm Overall Depth (Top View): 600 mm

overview_sections.heading: Elegant Comfort
overview_sections.body: Adam Soft Seating features a seamless flowing seat to arm design that invites relaxation while maintaining a contemporary, elegant presence. Its sculpted form enhances comfort and adds sophistication to modern lounges, collaborative areas, and reception spaces. Designed to create a warm, inviting atmosphere, it blends beauty with ease.
Supported by different base—customizable with different finish options—the chair offers both durability and visual refinement.
The smoothly curved backrest and integrated arm design offer a snug, ergonomic hold that supports natural posture and enhances comfort during prolonged sitting.
The rich, woven fabric and leather adds warmth and tactility, while delivering durability and a refined aesthetic suitable for premium cafés, lounges, and collaborative spaces.

matched.name: Alonzo
matched.description: Alonzo is a sofa designed for comfort and modern interiors.

features: Crafted for Modern Focus and Elevated Comfort
specs.dimensions: 01 SEATER Size - 850 X800 X450-750 H MM; 02 SEATER Size - 1500 X800 X450-750 H MM; 03 SEATER Size - 2000 X800 X450-750 H MM

overview_sections.heading: Crafted for Modern Focus and Elevated Comfort
overview_sections.body: Alonzo blends modern comfort with a distinctive channelled silhouette and wraparound design, creating natural boundaries for focused work or relaxed collaboration. Its form brings both style and purpose to contemporary spaces.
The precise vertical tufting adds visual texture while offering ergonomic support. Integrated side tables enhance functionality, extending usability without disrupting its clean, refined aesthetic.
Expertly detailed stitching delivers a classic, enduring appeal while reinforcing durability, ensuring the design remains elegant and intact through years of everyday use.

The precisely executed vertical tufting adds depth and structure to the upholstery, creating a refined visual rhythm. Beyond aesthetics, it enhances back support and maintains fabric integrity over time, delivering a clean, tailored look that elevates any modern workspace or lounge setting.

matched.name: Arcana
matched.description: Arcana is a lounge designed for executive spaces.

specs.dimensions: Overall Height: 790 Seat Height: 450; Seat Width(Front View): 500 Seat Depth (Top View): 490

overview_sections.heading: Essential Form
overview_sections.body: Arcana Soft Seating is defined by its precise curves and perfectly balanced proportions, creating a silhouette that feels both modern and inviting. Its slim frame supports a generously upholstered seat and back, achieving a look that is lightweight in form yet substantial in comfort.
Built for versatility, it transitions effortlessly across settings. From informal meetings to dining and lounge spaces, it offers substantial comfort in every environment.
The semi-curved back with padded side wings offers a gentle embrace, delivering improved lateral support and a relaxed seating feel ideal for long conversations.

matched.name: Arco
matched.description: Arco is a lounge designed for stylish and functional workspaces.

specs.dimensions: Overall Height (Side View): 750 mm Seat Height: 458 mm Overall Seat + Back Height (Front): 615 mm

overview_sections.heading: Elegant Comfort
overview_sections.body: Arco Soft Seating offers a seamless fusion of style and comfort with its flowing seat to arm design that naturally invites relaxation. The smooth, sculpted form creates a welcoming presence, making it ideal for modern lounges and sophisticated interior settings. Its balanced proportions enhance both visual appeal and user ease.

Supported by an elegant wooden base—customizable in a range of finishes—Arco combines durability with premium craftsmanship. The twin stitched backrest adds both strength and a refined, artisanal touch.
The deep, curved backrest offers an enveloping feel, giving superior comfort and a premium lounge experience ideal for relaxed seating spaces.
The generously padded, double-cushioned seat enhances softness and maintains shape over time, delivering long-lasting comfort and durability for high-traffic environments.
